home.welcomeTitle: Murakaza neza mu Tembera u Rwanda
home.welcomeDescription: Kimenuka igihugu cy'imikurire ibihumbi. Reba imbuga z'amarira, koneza amakura y'igihozo, menya umuco murambi, kandi ucire imbibikore z'ikaraniro mu Rwanda.
home.whyVisitDescription: Rwanda ni ikintu cy'andi mbi n'igihugu kizigira cyane mu Afrika. Habantu Parc National des Volcans na Lac Kivu kugeza mu mujyi wa Kigali, Rwanda itanga ibikorwa binyuze, imbuga z'amarira, n'ubwenge bukomeye.
home.gorillaDesc: Menya ibikorwa bitandukanye hamwe n'amakura y'igihozo.
home.landscapesDesc: Reba imikurire, amazi, amabwiriza, no imbuga z'amarira.
home.cultureDesc: Kimenuka iminota y'umuco, ibiryo, n'amateka y'u Rwanda.

about.tagline: Kimenuka umutima w'Afrika n'igihugu cy'imikurire ibihumbi.
about.historyP1: Rwanda ni igihugu kiza kiri mu burasirazuba bw'Afrika. Ibara ry'igihugu ry'imikurire ibihumbi, Rwanda ifite amateka makira, umuco murambi, n'imbuga z'amarira.
about.historyP2: Imyaka myinshi, Rwanda yari aho aba inzira nyinshi zakoranye n'umuco, imitsinzi, n'abayobozi bakomeye. Mugihe cyose, Rwanda yagaragaje ituze n'ubwigenge. Ubu, Rwanda ni mu mahanga y'Afrika azina vuba, iwemerererwamo ku isazi, ukuri, ituza ry'ibidukikije, n'amajyambere.
about.historyP3: Ubu Rwanda urambura abantu binyuze mu mahaguruka makira, umwaka w'amahoro, n'abaturage bakomeye.
about.leadershipDesc: Abayobozi ba Rwanda bagize uruhare runini mu kumurika u Rwanda, ubwenge, elimu, tekinoroji, turizima, ifurahurizo ry'ibidukikije, n'amajyambere y'ubukungu.
about.videoDesc: Ongereza irivere ryimurika aho ubonye umubiri, inyamanswa, umuco, imijyi, n'aho amasanga Rwanda.
about.tourismDesc: Rwanda itanga ibikorwa bitandukanye kuburi muntu. Wasobanukiraga ibikorwa, itumba, inyamanswa, ifoto, cyangwa umuco, Rwanda ifite ibyo uzakimara.
about.gorillaDesc: Kuja Parc National des Volcans kugira ngo umenya amakura mu mahanga yabo.
about.wildlifeDesc: Kimenuka inyamanswa z'Afrika mu mahanga yabyo.
